title: Body Composition Measurement in Conscious Mice
author: Louise Lantier
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yypfxvn

steps.title: Open the Minispec software
steps.instruction: Open the Minispec software. (If a popup window appears about Opus, click OK. The window should temporarily show the Opus software, then switch back to Minispec.)

steps.title: Log in with user name and...
steps.instruction: Log in with user name and password (provided by MMPC staff).

steps.title: If prompted, do the Daily Check...
steps.instruction: If prompted, do the Daily Check with the Daily Check Sample.

steps.title: Enter a Sample Batch name or...
steps.instruction: Enter a Sample Batch name or choose one from the dropdown menu (will add new samples to the existing Batch). The Sample Batch identifies a group of samples. This can be today’s date, a mouse line, a project, your name... You can add samples to a Batch at any point in the future.

steps.title: Calibration name
steps.instruction: Calibration name : select the calibration file in the drop down menu (only one choice).

steps.title: Sample name
steps.instruction: Sample name : enter the sample name (must start with a letter, no dash, underscore ok).

steps.title: Comment
steps.instruction: Comment: can be used to type in mouse body weight or any comment about the sample. Tip: enter body weight without any letters, and the software will calculate % Fat and % Lean in the final results file.

steps.title: Weigh your mouse and place it...
steps.instruction: Weigh your mouse and place it in the body comp clear plastic tube. Place plunger above the mouse.

steps.title: Place the tube in the Mini Spec Body Composition Analyzer
steps.instruction: Place the tube in the Mini Spec Body Composition Analyzer.

steps.title: Once measurement is done (~2min), the...
steps.instruction: Once measurement is done (~2min), the sample appears in the list in the bottom left. You can remove the mouse and place it back in its cage.

steps.title: Click on "Next Sample" (bottom left),...
steps.instruction: Click on "Next Sample" (bottom left), and enter new Sample name. Repeat Steps 7-12.

steps.title: Once you are done, click on...
steps.instruction: Once you are done, click on "View Results" (bottom left), then "Export to Excel" . Save your data on the desktop and exit the software. Transfer your data file to your flashdrive.

steps.title: Wash the tube and plunger in...
steps.instruction: Wash the tube and plunger in Sterilant solution, rinse with water and set to dry.
